{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20746_1
|class_id=20746
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20746_2
|fame=16
|art=18
|fth=29
|civ=15
|tech=12
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail RUSH +50<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail RUSH +100<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail RUSH +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss4=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail RUSH +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss7=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail RUSH +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
